title: caldesia parnassifolia var. major
intro: Caldesia parnassifolia var. major, also known as the large water-plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Alismataceae. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues, including coughs and bronchitis. Caldesia parnassifolia var. major can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
